case_title: RODOLFO DUMANDAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-30-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER VACATING SANCTION AS TO RODOLFO DUMANDAN IMPOSED ON OCT-30-2018.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUMANDAN, RODOLFO AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-27-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-19-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RODOLFO DUMANDAN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-30-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-15-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Rodolfo Dumandan, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. At the request of plaintiff, the Court ordered the case dismissed. For good cause, the $400 sanctions previously imposed against the plaintiff for failure to appear at the OCT-30-2018 OSC hearing is rescinded by the Court. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jan-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
